name: phase1a-open3d-lint2
command: pnpm --filter oando-site exec eslint features/planner/open3d/editor/useDockingSystem.ts features/planner/open3d/editor/TopBar.tsx features/planner/open3d/editor/InventoryPanel.tsx features/planner/open3d/canvas-fabric/FeasibilityCanvas.tsx features/planner/open3d/editor/PropertiesPanel.tsx features/planner/open3d/editor/OOPlannerWorkspace.tsx --max-warnings=100 2>&1 | Out-String -Width 4096
